identity: Gaunt mid-50s human male, pale skin, sharp cheekbones, completely white eyes glowing faintly with violet inner light, silver-white slicked-back hair pulled into a small knot, neat silver-white goatee.
outfit: Cracked obsidian academic robe with a high stiff collar embroidered with violet runic glyphs, leather-bound books and tattered scroll-tubes hanging on chains across the chest, plain dark boots. Faint halo of violet-and-black void-mist rising from his shoulders.
weapons: No physical weapon — casts violet-black void-orbs from outstretched hand.
portraitStyle: Head-and-shoulders bust, three-quarter view facing camera-left, calm sympathetic expression.
southStyle: Facing camera, calm idle, both hands held loosely in front, robe to ankle-length.
eastStyle: Facing east in three-quarter side view, calm idle, robe to ankle-length, books visible on chest.
east_attackStyle: Facing east, mid-spell-cast: right arm thrust forward hurling a violet-black void-orb the size of his head; left hand pulled back glowing with a violet rune.
east_koStyle: Lying defeated on the ground facing east, robe sprawled, eyes closed (no glow), void-mist dispersed to a thin wisp.

referenceSheet.note: Portrait is the canonical reference sheet — all four pose generations used reference_asset_id from the portrait so identity is locked. Generated M412 because the in-game encounter showed no graphic.
